title: kedrostis lanuginosa
intro: Kedrostis lanuginosa, also known as the African snail vine, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Kedrostis lanuginosa include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
